textByHash.122d963729ddb14e6c60b88ab0189113e8e8661b: Hey, I'm Justine. I've got some rewards here for fighters who've done well in Lisa's Last Man Standing game. Wanna see?
textByHash.98cdea79995a630d83232f01e79811318d047b17: My rule applies to the item regardless. Did you think I was going to cater differently to you?
textByHash.b21341ffcd926cb9450853f001867b3da99e24b7: I'll pay you points for one of those.
textByHash.c6371e8e871e52e9edc56a6a90746ff034e00089: Hey, that door's for staff only!
textByHash.dc3d691f9cba1240e2457b9c8b94163040354726: Sorry, I don't offer refunds on items that people can trade with each other.
